TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Baliwakes_Raera, title = Baliwakes_Raera, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baliwakes_Raera} }

S.FORM: ti Baliwakes Raera(ciniukukan: 陸森寶；pinuyumagan:Baliwakes Raera, 1910 a caviljan 11 a qiljasan 2 a qadavan -1988 a caviljan 3 a qiljasan 26 a qadavan), mavan a kisansemenay katua cacaquan a sinupuan, kemasi maza i valangaw a puyuma a qinaljan. izuanan ngadan nua rinipugan ti 森寶一郎 nua aya. qau aza kisansemenay ti paudull na malap tua kazalan a 金曲獎 a duqubi mavan uta nimadju a vuvu. kipalikuzan senay "卑南山"(penansan)(1949 a caviljan) "散步歌"(1953 a caviljan) "頌祭祖先"(1957 a caviljan) "美麗的稻穗"(1958 a caviljan) "思故鄉"(1958 a caviljan) "優美的普悠瑪青年"(1958 a caviljan) "再見大家"(1961 a caviljan) "祝福歌"(1961 a caviljan "天主羔羊"(1963 a caviljan) "上主垂憐"(1963 a caviljan) "卑南王"(1970 a caviljan) "南王互助社歌"(1970 a caviljan) "蘭嶼之戀"(1971 a caviljan) "神職晉鐸"(1972 a caviljan) "海祭"(1985 a caviljan) "懷念年祭"(1988 a caviljan)
S.PHON: ti baɭiwakəs raəra(ʦiniukukan: ****pinujumagan:baɭiwakəs raəra, **** a ʦaviʎan ** a qiʎasan * a qadavan -**** a ʦaviʎan * a qiʎasan ** a qadavan), mavan a kisansəmənaj katua ʦaʦaquan a sinupuan, kəmasi maza i vaɭaŋaw a pujuma a qinaʎan. izuanan ŋadan nua rinipugan ti **** nua aja. qau aza kisansəmənaj ti pauduɭɭ na maɭap tua kazaɭan a *** a duqubi mavan uta nimaɉu a vuvu. kipaɭikuzan sənaj "***"(pənansan)(**** a ʦaviʎan) "***"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "*****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "***"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "********"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "***"(**** a ʦaviʎan "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "***"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "******"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "**"(**** a ʦaviʎan) "****"(**** a ʦaviʎan)
S.FORM: ti Baliwakes Raera(ciniukukan: 陸森寶；pinuyumagan:Baliwakes Raera, 1910 a caviljan 11 a qiljasan 2 a qadavan -1988 a caviljan 3 a qiljasan 26 a qadavan), mavan a kisansemenay katua cacaquan a sinupuan, kemasi maza i valangaw a puyuma a qinaljan. izuanan ngadan nua rinipugan ti 森寶一郎 nua aya. qau aza kisansemenay ti paudull na malap tua kazalan a 金曲獎 a duqubi mavan uta nimadju a vuvu. kipalikuzan senay "卑南山"(penansan)(1949 a caviljan) "散步歌"(1953 a caviljan) "頌祭祖先"(1957 a caviljan) "美麗的稻穗"(1958 a caviljan) "思故鄉"(1958 a caviljan) "優美的普悠瑪青年"(1958 a caviljan) "再見大家"(1961 a caviljan) "祝福歌"(1961 a caviljan "天主羔羊"(1963 a caviljan) "上主垂憐"(1963 a caviljan) "卑南王"(1970 a caviljan) "南王互助社歌"(1970 a caviljan) "蘭嶼之戀"(1971 a caviljan) "神職晉鐸"(1972 a caviljan) "海祭"(1985 a caviljan) "懷念年祭"(1988 a caviljan)
